core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Tropical Warmth with Swiss Precision.
Emotion First: Sell the 'Dream of Island Living', not just square footage.
Content is King: High-resolution imagery is the hero. UI recedes.
Negative Space: Luxury = Space. Don't crowd the listings.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' font for headings (Use Playfair Display).
No pure black (#000000) or pure gray (#808080).
No 'Tech Blue' gradients. Use deep, rich Navy or Teal.

usage_rules: Body text and UI elements MUST use Manrope.
Use 'tracking-wide' for small uppercase labels (e.g., 'FOR SALE').

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: border border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-stone-100
cards.feature: bg-stone-100 p-8 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.default: rounded-none border-stone-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm

navigation.container: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

hero_section.structure: Full-screen (h-screen) background with centered, floating search bar.
hero_section.overlay: Heavy gradient at bottom to ensure text readability.
hero_section.content: Headline: 'Encuentra tu Paraíso en RD'. Subhead: 'Propiedades exclusivas para una vida extraordinaria'.

rules: First item spans 2 columns if possible (Featured).
Images must be tall (aspect-[4/5]) or wide (aspect-[16/9]) - avoid squares.

detail_page.layout: Split view: Left side sticky gallery, Right side scrollable details + contact form.

hero_background.alt: Luxury Villa with Pool in Dominican Republic

motion_guidelines.scroll: Use 'whileInView' for sections fading in up.
motion_guidelines.hover: Images scale slightly (1.05) on hover. Text underlines slide in.

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure Gold text is only used on Dark backgrounds. Use Dark Gray for text on White.
accessibility_rules.labels: All icon-only buttons (like WhatsApp) must have aria-labels.
accessibility_rules.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements (use ring-slate-900).

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic Spanish real estate copy.
Ensure the WhatsApp button is floating bottom-right, z-index 50.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (MapPin, Bed, Bath, Square).
Forms must use Shadcn UI components but styled to match the 'Stone/Navy' theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium Real Estate platform. Do not make it look like a dashboard. It should feel like a magazine. Use the provided image URLs. Implement the 'Bento' grid for the property list. Ensure the 'Contact' form is elegant and not cluttered.
